meta.name: description
meta.content: Lovers of a distinctive interior can indulge in HKLIVING, our goal is to provide everyone with an interior that truly suits you as a person.

div.h1: Heavy, sculptural objects that look museum-ready yet belong right in the middle of everyday life.

div.h2: Creative collaboration sits at the heart of Additions 2026 — a driving force in shaping the collection’s direction.

div.script:

function loadHotspot() { var w = $(document).innerWidth(); var viewportId = (w < 768) ? 2 : ((w < 992) ? 1 : ((w < 1200) ? 0 : 0));
if (!hotspots[viewportId]) { /* If viewport is not available. Use default */ viewportId = 0; }
if (hotspots[viewportId]) { var hotspot = JSON.parse(hotspots[viewportId]);
if (hotspot) { $('#image-map-pro-1').imageMapPro(hotspot); } }
document.removeEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", loadHotspot) }
if (document.readyState === "loading") { document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", loadHotspot); } else { loadHotspot(); } })();

div.h2: Let us guide you in the art of living — for homes that refuse to look like everyone else’s.

div.p: Our customer service team will be happy to assist you, please click here to get in touch with us.

div.span: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze our traffic and serve personalized content or ads. By clicking “Accept All” you consent to our use of cookies. For more information, please see our cookie statement and our privacy statement.

div.div: We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below. The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze how you use this website, store your preferences, and provide the content and advertisements that are relevant to you. These cookies will only be stored in your browser with your prior consent. You can choose to enable or disable some or all of these cookies but disabling some of them may affect your browsing experience.

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

Analytics & Tracking cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.
Marketing & Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customized advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyze the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.
